title: Order scheduling the delivery of a Reparations Order
text:
ICC-01/12-01/18-2780 24-03-2026 1/3
gravTranscript
Original: English No.: ICC-01/04-02/06
Original: English No.: ICC-01/12-01/18
Date: 24 March 2026
TRIAL CHAMBER X
Before: Judge Kimberly Prost, Single Judge
SITUATION IN THE REPUBLIC OF MALI
IN THE CASE OF
THE PROSECUTOR v. AL HASSAN AG ABDOUL AZIZ AG MOHAMED AG
MAHMOUD
Public
Order scheduling the delivery of a Reparations Order
No. ICC- ICC-01/12-01/18 1/3 24 March 2026

ICC-01/12-01/18-2780 24-03-2026 2/3
Order to be notified, in accordance with Regulation 31 of the Regulations of the Court, to:
☒ The Office of the Prosecutor ☒ Counsel for the Defence
Al Hassan Defence
☒ Legal Representatives of the Victims ☐ Legal Representatives of the Applicants
Al Hassan Victims
☐ Unrepresented Victims ☐ Unrepresented Applicants
(Participation/Reparation)
☒ The Office of Public Counsel for ☐ The Office of Public Counsel for the
Victims Defence
☒ States’ Representatives ☒ Trust Fund for Victims
Republic of Mali
☒ Amicus Curiae
Registrar ☐ Counsel Support Section
Mr Osvaldo Zavala Giler
☐ Victims and Witnesses Unit ☒ Detention Section
☒ Victims Participation and Reparations ☒ Public Information and Outreach
Section Section
No. ICC- ICC-01/12-01/18 2/3 24 March 2026

ICC-01/12-01/18-2780 24-03-2026 3/3
Judge Kimberly Prost, acting as Single Judge on behalf of Trial Chamber X (‘Single Judge’
and ‘Chamber’, respectively) of the International Criminal Court, in the case of The Prosecutor
v. Al Hassan Ag Abdoul Aziz Ag Mohamed Ag Mahmoud, having regard to Articles 75(2) and
76(4) of the Rome Statute and Rule 144 of the Rules of Procedure and Evidence, issues the
following ‘Order scheduling the delivery of the Reparations Order’.
THE SINGLE JUDGE HEREBY
ANNOUNCES that the Chamber will hold a public hearing on 28 April 2026 at 11:00 to
deliver its Reparations Order in the present case, in the presence of Mr Al Hassan Ag Abdoul
Aziz Ag Mohamed Ag Mahmoud, his defence team, the Legal Representatives of Victims, and
the Office of the Public Counsel for Victims; and
INVITES representatives of the Republic of Mali, the Trust Fund for Victims, the Registry
and the Office of the Prosecutor to attend this hearing.
Done in both English and French, the English version being authoritative.
_______________________
Judge Kimberly Prost
Single Judge
Dated this 24 March 2026
At The Hague, The Netherlands.
No. ICC- ICC-01/12-01/18 3/3 24 March 2026
